cards.title: Implement a function to reverse a linked list.
cards.desc: Use three pointers: prev, curr, next.
cards.approach: Use three pointers: prev, curr, next. Iterate through the list, reversing the direction of pointers at each node. Time: O(n), Space: O(1).

cards.title: Implement a solution to find the longest common subsequence (LCS) of two strings.
cards.desc: Use dynamic programming with a 2D table where dp[i][j] represents the LCS length for first i and j characters.
cards.approach: Use dynamic programming with a 2D table where dp[i][j] represents the LCS length for first i and j characters. If characters match, dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1] + 1, otherwise take the maximum of dp[i-1][j] and dp[i][j-1]. Time: O(m*n), Space: O(m*n).
